note: First-pass Invoker artifact-write/commit test, not final investment advice or a completed diligence model.
scope: Reconstruct 20+ years of Seneca Foods financials from primary filings, on both reported (LIFO) and FIFO-adjusted bases, to feed downstream claim verification, bear-case, and attribution lanes.

sourceAnchors.description: Seneca FY2025 10-K / annual report discloses a LIFO reserve of $359.3 million along with FIFO-adjusted earnings and FIFO EBITDA bridges.
sourceAnchors.source: Seneca Foods FY2025 10-K / annual report (inventory footnote and non-GAAP reconciliations)

sourceAnchors.description: S&P Dow Jones Indices announced the July 2023 deletion of SENEA from the S&P SmallCap 600, anchoring the index-flow / forced-selling attribution analysis.
sourceAnchors.source: S&P Dow Jones Indices index rebalance notice (July 2023)

sourceAnchors.description: Per the source plan's Decision Gate 2, Seneca valuation only passes if both reported (LIFO) and FIFO-adjusted calculations reconcile to filings; every rebuilt metric must tie back to a filing reference and a management non-GAAP bridge where disclosed.
sourceAnchors.requirement: reconcile reported and FIFO-adjusted views against primary filings
